data.title: Altitude launches public collateral-optimized lending platform
data.description:
Altitude, a DeFi lending platform, has opened its collateral-optimized lending service to the public following an eight-month private beta phase, based on information disclosed to Finbold on Friday, June 13. The platform enables automated strategies for efficient collateral management in lending and borrowing activities. During the beta testing period, Altitude attracted over $5 million in total value locked (TVL) from whitelisted participants. The platform is designed to help users manage onchain borrowing while maintaining optimal capital efficiency and preventing under-collateralization
source: https://finbold.com/altitude-launches-public-collateral-optimized-lending-platform/

data.title: Bitcoin(BTC) Surpasses 105,000 USDT with a Narrowed 2.33% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On Jun 13, 2025, 08:09 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has crossed the 105,000 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 105,010.09375 USDT, with a narrowed narrowed 2.33% decrease in 24 hours.

data.title: MyStonks completes upgrade and officially launches 95 US stock on-chain tokens
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News MyStonks, a decentralized US stock token trading platform, announced the completion of the upgrade and officially launched on-chain tokens covering 95 mainstream US stocks, including Microsoft (MSFT), Nvidia (NVDA), Apple (AAPL), Amazon (AMZN), Google (GOOGL), Meta (META), Tesla (TSLA), JPMorgan Chase (JPM), Bank of America (BAC), UnitedHealth (UNH) and other top global companies.
It is reported that MyStonks has reached a strategic cooperation with Fidelity, a global asset management giant, and Fidelity provides 100% asset custody guarantee for platform users to ensure that each token corresponds to real and compliant stock holdings. Users only need to use USDT or USDC stablecoins through self-hosted wallets to directly buy and sell corresponding ERC-20 stock tokens. The platform converts stablecoins into US dollars, purchases real stocks, and mints tokens 1:1 through the Base chain smart contract. The tokens held by users represent actual stock shares and can be traded or redeemed on the chain at any time. Price data is provided in real time by Chainlink oracles, ensuring fair and transparent transaction prices and improving asset liquidity and security.

data.title: International oil prices saw their biggest one-day increase in years
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News International oil prices have seen their largest one-day percentage increase in years, reflecting concerns that the expansion of the conflict in the Middle East could lead to serious energy supply disruptions. Brent crude oil prices rose 4.3% to $72.4 per barrel. WTI crude oil prices rose 5% to $71.4 per barrel. According to Reuters, this is the largest one-day increase in benchmark contracts since March 2022, a month after the full outbreak of the Russian-Ukrainian conflict. Ahmad Assiri, a research strategist at financial services firm Pepperstone, wrote that the surge in Brent crude oil prices illustrates both "imminent supply concerns and a growing sense that negative news could prolong the escalation of the situation, unlike the previous Israel-Iran conflict." (Jinshi)

data.title: Trader AguilaTrades Closes Bitcoin Position Amid Market Fluctuations
data.description:
According to PANews, trader AguilaTrades recently closed a significant Bitcoin position due to market adjustments. Initially, AguilaTrades utilized a 20x leverage to go long on Bitcoin, with a total position valued at $434 million. However, as Bitcoin's price experienced a downturn, the trader began to close the position in batches starting early this morning, completing the process ten minutes ago. The trade involved $29.85 million in USDC as collateral, resulting in a loss of $12.48 million, leaving $17.37 million in remaining funds.

Currently, AguilaTrades holds only a single short position in Bitcoin valued at $870,000.

data.title: Hong Kong Advances Digital Asset Regulations and Licensing
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, Hong Kong's Financial Secretary, Paul Chan, announced at the 2025 Caixin Summer Summit that the region has implemented licensing systems for digital asset trading platforms and stablecoins. Additionally, regulatory frameworks for custody and over-the-counter trading are being developed.

Chan stated that this month, Hong Kong will release a second policy declaration on the development of digital assets in the region. The declaration will focus on integrating financial services with innovation and expanding the application scenarios for digital assets.

data.title: AguilaTrades, a giant whale, closed its 20x leveraged BTC long position worth $434 million, resulting in a loss of $12.48 million
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to Ember's monitoring, the $434 million BTC leveraged long positions opened by the whale AguilaTrades on June 9 have all been closed, with a loss of $12.48 million. The trader used a rolling strategy to expand his position to the peak on the 11th, and was eventually forced to close his position when BTC pulled back in the early hours of this morning. His margin account shrank from 29.85 million USDC to 17.37 million USDC, with a loss rate of 41.8%.
Currently, the address still holds $870,000 in BTC short positions.

data.title: Chan Mo-po: Hong Kong will publish its second policy statement on digital asset development in June
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Hong Kong SAR Financial Secretary Paul Chan said at the 2025 Caixin Summer Summit that Hong Kong has launched a licensing system for digital asset trading platforms and stablecoins, and is promoting regulatory arrangements for custody and over-the-counter transactions. "This month, we will publish the second policy statement on the development of digital assets in Hong Kong, focusing on the combination of financial services and innovation, and expanding the application scenarios of digital assets." (Shanghai Securities News)

data.title: Gate Wallet launches new BountyDrop section, unified tasks and airdrop experience fully upgraded
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News In order to improve the user experience, Gate Wallet has merged the original "Task Square" and "Airdrop" modules into BountyDrop, and launched the first ecological month event, selecting four high-quality projects of Mantle Ecological Month to be launched simultaneously: HyperPlay, Symbiosis, MOMO.FUN, Vertex, and participating in the task can unlock the airdrop reward. After the event, 1,200 participants who complete all tasks will share 12,000 MNT.
BountyDrop's new section page structure is simple and intuitive, supporting multi-chain screening, popular classification, and reward history viewing; the reward distribution process is clearer, and the user's participation status and progress are clear at a glance. BountyDrop is an airdrop task platform on Gate Wallet that is open all year round, continuously updated, and has no threshold to participate. It is committed to helping users explore the entire Web3 world efficiently with one wallet.

data.title: World Liberty Financial officially connected to OKX Wallet
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official website, World Liberty Financial has officially connected to OKX Wallet. Users will be able to seamlessly access World Liberty Financial through OKX Wallet and participate in cross-chain services such as stablecoin USD1.
It is reported that World Liberty Financial (WLF) is a decentralized financial (DeFi) platform that allows users to maximize their cryptocurrency assets through DeFi protocols. OKX Wallet is the industry's leading one-stop Web3 portal, which has supported more than 130 popular public chains and provides a seamless experience of four terminals: App, plug-in, web page and Telegram Mini wallet, creating an efficient and convenient on-chain interactive environment for users.

data.title: Ethereum Foundation Transfers 1,000 ETH to Associated Address
data.description: According to PANews, the Ethereum Foundation has internally transferred 1,000 ETH, valued at approximately $2.5 million, to an associated address identified as 0xc061...0B6d. This move was detected by PeckShield, a blockchain security firm, highlighting the ongoing activities within the Ethereum Foundation's financial operations.
